content:
Rey-Khan

Realm: Caro
Type: Warden
Birthday: 17th Nov
Gender: Female
Nous index: 31
Based on: Aiueb Gnshal


“ You have forgotten me, brother. But these eyes, they do not forget. ”

【Memory】, 【Character】, and 【Emotion】—
The strange and fragile coordinates by which a self is drawn.
To most beings, they are no more than a passing mirage: impressions that erode, dissolve, and are ultimately forgotten. Yet there are those who linger too long at the edge of the unknown. Those who stare into the void until it begins, inevitably, to stare back.
For the void does not merely observe. It remembers.
The uninvited horrors beyond the stars, ancient and unbound by time, fixed their gaze upon her when all others had forgotten. From their remembrance, they fashioned a new her—not reborn, but reconstructed. Not restored, but defined.
Thus, she exists only as what they recall her to be.
She cannot change. She cannot escape.
For to be remembered is not salvation, nor annihilation—
It is entrapment.
A perfect, eternal confinement,
sealed within a prison known as “yourself.”

(Art by chatGPT, i cant fking draw）
thread_title: Doorstain's dissoluted siste Rey-Khan OC kit (Meme sorta)
